flashcards.definition: P(t) = L/(1 + be⁻ᵏᵗ); models growth limited by carrying capacity L.
The maximum sustainable population; upper horizontal asymptote.
The characteristic shape of a logistic graph: slow start, fast middle, slow finish.
Occurs at P = L/2; the point where growth rate is maximum.
P(0) = L/(1 + b); set t = 0 to find the starting population.
